title: Rafael Lopes
text:
I’m a computational epidemiologist at Yale University, working on climate change impact into infectious diseases. By training I’m either a physicist (specializing in mathematical and statistical modelling for disease transmission and spread) or environmental and climate epidemiologist; professionally, I’ve worked as a data scientist and barista. I like drawing maps!
On this site I keep a list of my CV







nowcaster | Nowcasting to delay correction to epidemiological data.
